name: codex-hud
description: Persistent Claude HUD-style telemetry and activity display for Codex CLI.

interface.shortDescription: Live context, quota, tools, agents, and task status for Codex CLI.
interface.longDescription: Codex HUD adds a persistent terminal HUD, guided configuration, diagnostics, and lifecycle integration for local Codex CLI sessions.
defaultPrompt: Set up Codex HUD for this machine.
Set up or customize my Codex HUD display.
Review my current Codex HUD fields and let me choose what to enable or disable.
Diagnose why Codex HUD is not updating.
